library/api reference.rationale: API docs in references/, code snippets and examples in assets/

product verification.rationale: Test/validation scripts in scripts/, assertion patterns and specs in references/

data fetching.rationale: Query scripts in scripts/, schema docs in references/, cached results in data/

business process.rationale: Run logs and state in data/, workflow documentation in references/

code scaffolding.rationale: Templates and boilerplate in assets/, pattern documentation in references/

code quality.rationale: Linting/analysis scripts in scripts/, style guides in references/

ci/cd & deployment.rationale: Deploy/publish scripts in scripts/, rollback logs in data/

runbooks.rationale: Investigation playbooks in references/, incident logs in data/

infrastructure ops.rationale: Cleanup/management scripts in scripts/, approval workflows in data/, config docs in references/
